Our Mission

Anamay is dedicated to empowering women working as nannies or in domestic roles by providing them with specialized skills and dignified work opportunities. Through the artisanal craft of botanical soap and hygiene product making, we transform daily rituals into a movement of pure craftsmanship and communal care.

Amara Singh

Founder & Master Soaper

"Hygiene is the first step toward reclaiming one's dignity and power."

Maya Patel

Hygiene Access Coordinator

"Cleanliness is a fundamental right, and our mission ensures it is never out of reach."

The artisanal hands and compassionate hearts behind Anamay’s purity.

Meet Our Team

Elena Rossi

Artisanal Perfumer

"Every scent we craft is a botanical story of resilience and grace."

Clara De Marco

Sourcing Specialist

"Respecting the soil allows us to truly respect the skin we touch with our botanicals."

Akua Mensah

Lead Artisan

"Transitioning from domestic labor to soap artistry has given my craft a new purpose."

Corporate Social Responsibility (CSR)

At Anamay, we believe purity and dignity should be a fundamental standard for all. Our commitment to curated artisanal craft is matched by a deep-rooted social promise: 10% of our profits are dedicated to the construction of clean, respectful bathroom facilities in rural communities. By improving hygiene infrastructure, we ensure that our core promise of pristine care and personal dignity extends beyond our workshop to every community we touch.

Pure Soaps, Pristine Hygiene
